h1.visual_description: Not present on this page, but typically reserved for Chapter titles in this textbook style.

h2.visual_description: Centered, serif font, larger than body text, used for figure group titles or sub-sections.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Internal cross-reference hyperlink (e.g., to figures or other chapters).
Introduction or definition of a key technical term.

visual_matchers.pattern: bold text at the start of a block below an image
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure label and number prefix for a caption.
Sub-figure identifiers within a multi-part image or caption.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Parenthetical blue links for internal figures; standard text for external references.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Bottom footer containing 'Page Number | Chapter Title Section Number: Section Title'.
